name: SAE First AI Opportunity Intake
positioning: A credential-free n8n template that qualifies AI automation leads from NexusAI.ma, Intch, WhatsApp, or partner referrals.

inputs.name: problem
inputs.example: We receive many WhatsApp questions and need faster qualification before booking appointments.

shippingChecklist: Activate workflow or use test webhook mode.
Confirm the JSON response contains a qualification and recommended offer.
Connect the webhook URL to NexusAI.ma, Intch follow-up forms, or a WhatsApp intake form.
upgradePath: Persist leads to Airtable, Google Sheets, Notion, or CRM.
Send hot leads to WhatsApp, email, Slack, or Telegram.
Add an AI summary node once credentials are available.
Generate a proposal draft from the recommended offer.
